nasb.text: So be ready by morning, and come up in the morning to Mount Sinai, and present yourself there to Me on the top of the mountain.

esv.text: Be ready by the morning, and come up in the morning to Mount Sinai, and present yourself there to me on the top of the mountain.

cnv.text: 早晨之前，你要預備好了；到早晨的時候，你要上到西奈山來，在山頂上站在我面前。

ccb.text: 你要预备好，明天清早你要上西奈山顶来见我。
